title: Adds the --override-variant command line flag
body:
This is part of #790 and can be merged only after https://github.com/containers/image/pull/786 or https://github.com/containers/image/pull/753

I'm not sure how dependencies work exactly in Go so I did not test this locally against the patched `containers/image` version, but it should work once that dependency is updated.

comments.body: ACK to the Skopeo part (but it will need to update c/image to one that actually supports that flag).
@JirkaChadima @mtrmac @vrothberg Do we still need/want this PR?

> @JirkaChadima @mtrmac @vrothberg Do we still need/want this PR?

I'm fine without it, we have changed the pipeline for other reasons. But I still think it's a valuable addition to skopeo.
I rebased to retrigger the tests; just to be sure.
